concerns: Threat-model module has no index.ts and no render function — only threat-schema.ts and threat-rules.ts exist. The plan should specify whether to import evaluateThreatRules directly from './threat-model/threat-rules' or first create a threat-model/index.ts barrel export. Current plan step 2 is ambiguous on the import path.

Threat-model is not wired into main.ts (US-029 only added the rules/schema, not a renderer). The plan says to insert hardening 'after the existing modules (threat-model or shadow-profile)' — but threat-model has no presence in main.ts. Clarify that hardening goes after shadow-profile, which is the actual last module.

Plan step 7 says renderHardeningModule takes a container parameter (renderHardeningModule(container)), but the existing module pattern in main.ts returns an element that gets appendChild'd to dashboard — not a container-injection pattern. The function signature should return Promise<HTMLElement> to match renderPermissionDebtModule and renderShadowProfileModule, not accept a container.
